---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Omnilimb
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do, and what's getting in the way today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. If it touches a tool or dashboard route, name it.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context

Links, examples, or references (e.g. a skill market API, a comparable feature
elsewhere).
